content:
Alhamdulillah! 🌟
I'm delighted and grateful to share that I've officially secured my permanent position at UnitedLex. This milestone reflects hard work, learning, and the support of amazing colleagues and mentors.
Thank you to everyone who has been part of this journey. Looking forward to growing, contributing, and achieving many more milestones ahead! 🚀
#Grateful #CareerMilestone #UnitedLex
comment: Permanent roles often change the game from 'fit' to 'impact'; early months are where owning a niche and mapping key stakeholders really compounds leverage
